reviews.comment:
Mis 5 estrellas son para la atención en full 26/1 11 am súper serviciales los chicos, limpio y ordenado todo. En playa son lentos, pero creo que en general la gente de provincia se toma su tiempo para todo. Baños bien.

(Translated by Google)
My 5 stars are for the service throughout January 26, 11 am. The staff was super helpful, and everything was clean and tidy. They were slow on the beach, but I think people in the provinces generally take their time with everything. The bathrooms were good.

reviews.comment:
Vergonzoso! Dice abierto las 24 hs y no es así.  A las 22.50 hs quise comprar y el muchacho me dijo solo hasta las 23. Llamé a mi esposo para comprarle las hamburguesas que ya tenían hechas, los chicos quisieron venderme porque eran las 22.55 hs y una anciana de anteojos les dijo que no y apagó las luces. Fuimos varios los que quedamos sin comprar, veníamos de atravesar durante horas la nada misma, cientos de kilómetros de ruta sin un lugar donde caernos muertos, sólo pretendía algo para comer con mis dos nenes... Era comprar rápido e irnos, nada más.
Gracias a Dios está el restaurante del ACA a pocos metros de ahí. Ellos sí que brindan una excelente atención, riquísima la comida, nadie nos apuró y ellos sí cierran temprano. Más que comprensivos con todos los viajeros. Vayan enfrente!!!

(Translated by Google)
Shameful! It says it's open 24 hours, but it's not. At 10:50 PM, I wanted to buy something, and the guy told me they were only open until 11:00 PM. I called my husband to buy the hamburgers they already had made. The guys tried to sell to me because it was 10:55 PM, but an elderly woman with glasses told them no and turned off the lights. Several of us were left without anything to buy. We had just driven for hours through the middle of nowhere, hundreds of kilometers of highway without a place to stop. I just wanted something to eat with my two kids... We needed to buy something quickly and leave, nothing more.
Thank God there's the ACA restaurant just a few meters away. They provide excellent service, the food is delicious, no one rushed us, and they actually close early. They're incredibly understanding with all the travelers. Go across the street!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcWRxejNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Terrible!! Llegamos y una señora de anteojos 22:50 nos cerró la puerta, dice 24 hs y cierra a las 23 ....... Va antes de las 23.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible!! We arrived and a woman with glasses closed the door on us at 10:50 PM. It says 24 hours and it closes at 11 PM... It's before 11 PM.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcWRxME1REAE

reviews.comment:
Llegamos 10:50 y le preguntamos si podíamos comprar algunas de las hamburguesas que ya estaban hechas y nos dijeron que si. Volvimos 10:55 con el resto de mí familia siendo que venimos viajando desde bs as y nos cerraron la puerta en la cara. La vieja de anteojos que atendía de mala forma nos dijo que ya estaban cerrados y nos quedamos sin comer.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived at 10:50 and asked if we could buy some of the hamburgers that were already made, and they said yes. We returned at 10:55 with the rest of my family, having traveled from Buenos Aires, and they closed the door in our faces. The elderly woman with glasses who was rudely serving us told us they were already closed, and we went without food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcWZMcXl3RRAB
